normalization.notes: Store Kannada text in NFC and preserve source forms. Analysis tooling may inspect consonant plus vowel-sign and virama sequences for akshara segmentation.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: independent vowels, consonant bases, dependent vowel signs, anusvara, virama, and selected ottakshara forms
segmentation.notes: Kannada is an abugida. Count visible aksharas and teachable parts separately because vowel signs, inherent vowel handling, virama, and subjoined consonant forms affect decoding and font shaping.
